params.start: The distance along the path to the start of the segment.
params.stop: The distance along the path to the end of the segment.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> to which the path segment is appended.
params.startWithMoveTo: true to prepend a move-to at the start of the segment; otherwise, false.

fields.returns: true if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the path between two distances and appends it to the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
